title: Seamoths!
description: The Iconic vehicle of Subnautica enters the world of Minecraft!
body:
**Seamoths!** is a mod that adds the legendary Seamoth from Subnautica into Minecraft.

Craft, deploy, and pilot a fully functional Seamoth to explore the depths of Minecraft’s oceans with speed and style. Whether you're searching for ocean monuments, shipwrecks, or just cruising the seas, the Seamoth gives you a powerful underwater vehicle built for adventure.

Features:
- Pilotable Seamoth vehicle
- Fast underwater travel
- Designed for deep-sea exploration
- Built to fit naturally into Minecraft gameplay
- Perfect for explorers who want to bring a bit of Subnautica’s underwater technology into their Minecraft worlds.

 

To get started all you need to do is find some redstone, titanium, lead, and kelp.

 

 

PLANNED FEATURES:

Seaglides

Dyeable Seamoths
